title: Elytra Durability Indicator
description: Stylishly render your elytra durability under your crosshair!
body:
This is a very simple mod that, when you have an elytra on, renders a small indicator of your elytra's durability below your crosshair. 


Mod originally made for the upcoming modpack Vampires Strikes Back.

![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/955d265532122dac1f5d377b3d675b2cdca57ccf.png)




All the bar values (offsets, sizes, bar color) are configurable in the mod's client config.
The elytra icon can be modified with a texture pack in modid:textures/gui/elytra_icon, but can only be 16x16
